case_title: BUU V NGUYEN VS. AFFIRM LOAN SERVICES LLC

docket_entries.description: SC-109(AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR) LAUREN ORTEGO FILED BY DEFENDANT AFFIRM LOAN SERVICES LLC
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE CLAIM HEARING OF AUG-24-2023 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT AFFIRM LOAN SERVICES LLC
DECLARATION RE:REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT AFFIRM LOAN SERVICES LLC
ORDER REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM DEFENDANT GRANTED**
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,000.00 FILED BY NGUYEN, BUU V AS TO DEFENDANT AFFIRM LOAN SERVICES LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-30-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER ; CASE CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO THURSDAY, AUGUST 24, 2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT.506.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00); AGENT FOR SERVICE - CT CORPORATION SYSTEM SERVED APR-28-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT AFFIRM LOAN SERVICES LLC

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-30-2023 - CONTINUED TO AUG-24-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF BUU NGUYEN IS PRESENT. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT AFFIRM LOAN SERVICES LLP. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. THE CASE IS CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO THURSDAY, AUGUST 24, 2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT.506. PLAINTIFF WILL SECURE LETTER FROM BANK OF AMERICA CONFIRMING ACCOUNT ENDING IN "2958" WAS CLOSED ON 10.17.22 AND NO DEPOSITS WERE ACCEPTED TO THIS ACCOUNT. ONCE LETTER IS RECEIVED, IT WILL BE SHARED WITH DEFENDANT. IF PARTIES FAIL TO SETTLE, THEN JUDGMENT OF $6,000.00 PLUS $75.00 COSTS SHALL BE ENTERED IN AT THE NEXT HEARING. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (506/JPT)
